Lyric ITZY - Girls Will Be Girls (Rock Remix)

Romanization

Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls will be
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls
Ah ya ya ya
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls will be
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls
Ah ya ya ya
Street wiro danggin trigger
buri buteo beorin simjang
Giddy giddy here we go my friend
nareul guwonhae jul hero
ttawin wonchi anneun ego
gidarineun geon not my way
I slay, I slay, I slay
du sone kkwak umkyeojwin nae modeun geol throw it all
gikkeoi nan drop
neoui soneul daesin hold
igeon uriraneun syndrome
We're gonna paint the void
Count 3, 2, 1
We all scream
Let me hear you sing
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls will be
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls
Ah ya ya ya
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls will be
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls
Ah ya ya ya, ah ya ya ya
sesange ullin our siren
jamdeun yeolgireul kkaewonae
Ah ya ya ya, ah ya ya ya
Count 3, 2, 1
We all scream
Girls will be girls yeah
hyeonsiriran ttaeron black out
All the way downtown to the city
You’ll be alright
geuttaemada ne son jabajul naini
Finally hanaga doen uril
Who can block? We’ll keep going on
Woo woo woo
Ah we’re
kkaejin yuri wira haedo ditgo seo hit the road
gikkeoi nan go
neowa hamkkeramyeon glow
keojyeoganeun our synergy
han georeummada blow
Count 3, 2, 1
We all scream
Girls will be girls
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls will be
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls
Ah ya ya ya
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls will be
Girls will be girls will be girls will be girls
Ah ya ya ya, ah ya ya ya
deo keuge ullil our siren
hamkke gajulge to the end
Ah ya ya ya, ah ya ya ya

We all scream
Girls will be girls yeah
